summary: Comprehensive testing of TARS AI assistant with Google Places API integration. All backend tests passed (9/9). Frontend testing confirmed: login works, dashboard shows 27 habits and 5 events, Viagem NYC event has 6 activities in itinerary, 3-column modal (Roteiro, Buscar Lugares, Assistente IA) works correctly.

issues: Google Maps API deprecation warnings - PlacesService deprecated March 2025 (still functional)
google.maps.Marker deprecated - should migrate to AdvancedMarkerElement
open_now property deprecated - should use isOpen() method

backend_tests.test_tars_search_italian_restaurants_tim: PASS - TARS searches via Google Places API
backend_tests.test_tars_add_activity_to_nyc_trip: PASS - TARS adds activities to itinerary

frontend_tests.login_page_loads: PASS - Login page with email/password fields
frontend_tests.dashboard_shows_habits: PASS - Shows 27 habits (5 of 27 done today)
frontend_tests.dashboard_shows_events: PASS - Shows Viagem NYC, Aniversário da Mãe, UFC White House
frontend_tests.events_page_works: PASS - Events page shows all events with details
frontend_tests.itinerary_modal_opens: PASS - 3-column modal opens for Viagem NYC
frontend_tests.itinerary_shows_activities: PASS - Shows 6 activities across multiple days
frontend_tests.place_search_visible: PASS - PlaceSearch component with Restaurantes/Cafés filters

action_items: FUTURE: Migrate Google Maps PlacesService to new Place API (deprecated March 2025)
FUTURE: Replace open_now with isOpen() method
critical_code_review_comments: Google Places API integration working correctly with real data
TARS function calling (search_places, add_to_itinerary) working via GPT-4o
array_filters used correctly for MongoDB nested array updates
data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
3-column layout works on desktop, tabs work on mobile
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. TARS AI assistant with Google Places API integration is fully functional. User rafael has 27 habits and 5 events including Viagem NYC with 6 activities in itinerary. Google Maps API shows deprecation warnings but all features work.

verified_features.tars_search_places: Working - Uses Google Places API (geocoding + nearbySearch)
verified_features.tars_add_to_itinerary: Working - Uses MongoDB array_filters for nested updates
verified_features.itinerary_modal_3_columns: Working - Roteiro, Buscar Lugares, Assistente IA
verified_features.place_search_component: Working - Filters by type (Restaurantes, Cafés, etc.)
